title: Flipper Zero App Catalog
description: Curated Flipper Zero app catalog with the best Flipper Zero apps, plugins, games, tools, and community resources from official and community sources.

featured.name: 123DiceDnD
featured.description: D&D dice roller for Flipper Zero — all polyhedral dice with 3D animation. Momentum firmware

featured.name: 123PuffPacer
featured.description: Flipper Zero puff timer for IQOS, HEETS, TEREA, Lil Solid, glo, and Ploom. Pace heated tobacco sessions with vibration and sound alerts.

items.name: Enhanced Sub-Ghz Chat
items.description: Send text messages over Sub-GHz radio to another Flippers
items.author: @twisted-pear & @xMasterX & more in ReadMe

items.name: Flipper Share
items.description: Direct file transfer between flippers via Sub-GHz
items.author: @lomalkin

items.name: Genie Door Recorder
items.description: This application extracts the codes from a Genie garage door remote into a .GNE file.  It also plays back a .GNE file to a Genie garage door opener.
items.author: CodeAllNight (MrDerekJamison)

items.name: HC-11 modem
items.description: HC-11 wireless modem
items.author: Giraut

items.name: Music to Sub-GHz Radio
items.description: Converts Flipper music files (.FMF and .TXT) into Sub-GHz files (.SUB).

items.name: POCSAG Pager
items.description: App can capture POCSAG 1200 messages on CC1101 supported frequencies.

items.name: ProtoView
items.description: Digital signal detection, visualization, editing and reply tool
